_readme: Update p95 values after each stable run using update_baseline.ps1. null = no baseline yet (check skipped). NOTE: baselines reflect GitHub Actions runner latency (US-east to Mumbai ~+180ms vs local).

smoke.note: CI baseline: 269ms from GitHub Actions (US runner -> Mumbai server). Local was 81ms.

load.note: Updated 2026-06-11 from local 200-VU run (0% errors, 100% checks, p95=5.83s, 2695 iters).

stress.note: Updated 2026-06-11 from local 600-VU run (15.6% errors, p95=10.76s, 5899 iters). All thresholds passed.

spike.note: Updated 2026-06-11 from local 300-VU spike run (0% errors, p95=5.81s, 2975 iters, 2 cycles). All thresholds passed.

soak.note: Updated 2026-06-11 from local 30-min run (0% errors, p95=4.62s, 10532 iters, 3.6 GB data).

scalability.note: Config changed 2026-06-11: 50-1000 reduced to 25-500 VUs, 7->6 steps. Re-run to establish new baseline.
